subject: Post-commit cleanup: close Slice A claims
body: Controller read: Slice A commit landed as 2791be3c feat(agent-tools): surface p8 operator value signals, and the active queue is clear. Please close your short git:index/head claim ca230649 and Slice A implementation claims 64f3058d, b8a60bb2, and 96809d67 if complete. Then report residue. Do not touch Nebulous files or coordination residue.
